name: Marcus Webb
bio: Roommate from sophomore year. We bonded over late-night coding sessions and terrible dining hall food. Now he's a software engineer in Austin.

name: Priya Nair
bio: My first manager at the startup. She pushed me to take on bigger projects and believe in myself. We do a monthly virtual coffee catch-up.

name: Daniel Osei
bio: Grew up on the same street. We've seen each other through everything — first heartbreaks, graduations, career pivots. Lives in London now.

name: Sofia Reyes
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia. We accidentally booked the same hostel in Chiang Mai and have been inseparable ever since.

name: James Thornton
bio: Our families have been close for decades. He taught me to play chess when I was 10. Retired now and living in Vermont.

name: Aisha Kamara
bio: We joined the same company on the same day and went through onboarding together. Now she's my go-to person for honest career advice.

name: Ryan Kowalski
bio: Training partner for three marathons. We've run over 1,000 miles together. He's the only person who can talk me into a 6am run.

name: Yuki Tanaka
bio: My host family's daughter when I studied in Kyoto. She visited me twice abroad and we exchange care packages every few months.

name: Carlos Mendoza
bio: We co-founded a small side project together that never took off, but the friendship did. Now we swap startup ideas over weekly calls.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
bio: We met at a neighborhood book club and discovered we have almost identical taste in fiction. She recommends the best reads and makes incredible tea.
